response.justification: Strong engineering foundation with 20+ years of software experience across multiple domains and proven entrepreneurial track record, but the role requires demonstrated deep AI/ML expertise and recognized AI product leadership. Current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is a positive signal but insufficient evidence of the specialized AI domain expertise and strategic AI product experience this director-level role demands. Missing preferred Master's/PhD in AI and no evidence of shipping recognized AI products or platforms.
strengths: 20+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, hardware, and infrastructure—exceeds 15-year requirement
Proven entrepreneurial mindset with GISCollective founder role and multiple early-stage company positions
Strong full-stack technical depth with demonstrated mentorship, workshops, and knowledge-sharing across organizations
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise—current AI-agent infrastructure work is infrastructure-focused rather than deep machine learning or AI strategy
No advanced degree in AI/ML (Master's or PhD preferred); no evidence of recognized AI domain expertise or leadership
No evidence of building or shipping AI products or platforms; missing track record of AI innovation and thought leadership
